mnemonics: STARS Shine Brightly: Simplifies, Tunes, Aggregates, Reduces, Speeds
keyPoints: Simplifies queries due to denormalized structure
Provides better performance for read-heavy analytical workloads
Makes aggregation and reporting more intuitive
commonMistakes: Using it for transactional systems (OLTP) instead of analytical systems (OLAP)
Over-normalizing the fact table, which defeats the purpose of the star schema
